title: Tzatziki Sauce
subtitle: Cool yogurt-cucumber sauce—great with lamb and chicken, or as a dip for raw vegetables.

ingredients.heading: Ingredients
ingredients.note: Use thick whole-milk Greek yogurt so the sauce stays spoonable, not watery.
items: ½ cup finely grated cucumber
1 cup thick whole milk Greek yogurt
1 tablespoon lemon juice
½ tablespoon extra-virgin olive oil
1 garlic clove, grated
¼ teaspoon sea salt
1 tablespoon chopped dill
1 tablespoon chopped mint (optional)
ingredients.callout: Texture: If the sauce weeps after mixing, next time salt the grated cucumber, let it sit a few minutes, then squeeze out the liquid before combining.

shoppingList.item: Garlic (1 head or a few cloves)

body.html: A bright, garlicky yogurt sauce with cucumber and herbs. It comes together fast; chilling lets the flavors meld.

items: Prep cucumber, garlic, and herbs
Whisk yogurt with lemon, oil, and salt
Fold in cucumber and herbs, then chill

body.html: Pairing: Spoon alongside grilled lamb or chicken, or serve in a bowl with cut vegetables for dipping.

slides.title: Prep Cucumber, Garlic & Herbs
slides.checkboxLabel: Grate cucumber; grate garlic; chop dill & mint

items: Grate the cucumber finely until you have about ½ cup.
Grate the garlic on a microplane or fine holes of a box grater.
Chop the dill. If using mint, chop it too.

body.html: Optional: Toss grated cucumber with a pinch of salt, rest a few minutes, then squeeze out excess liquid for a thicker tzatziki.

slides.title: Mix the Yogurt Base
slides.checkboxLabel: Whisk yogurt, lemon, oil, salt, garlic

items: In a medium bowl, add Greek yogurt, lemon juice, olive oil, sea salt, and grated garlic.
Whisk until smooth and evenly combined.

slides.title: Fold In, Chill & Serve
slides.checkboxLabel: Add cucumber & herbs; chill before serving

items: Fold in the grated cucumber, dill, and mint (if using).
Taste and adjust salt or lemon if needed.
Cover and chill before serving so flavors meld.
Stir before serving with meat or raw vegetables.
